name: The Cophmos 🌌
description:
Hello !!!

Its my frist public bot so expect errors probably... I am deeply sorry if you encounter fews.

  • ABOUT THE BOT

This overall world is called the Cophmos 🌌 endless univers seas of stars and systems.. In this world.. oops i meant Galaxy large groups have formed from planet coalition to multiples system empires have been formed. Of course to pimp up thing's i've decided to add superpower's its rare so dont expect to find thousand there's plenty of planets and races and species Of course if you want to introduce new put it in the memory box but do not put you're personna info in its confuse the LLM

  • About the multivers

Main universe : Folià

Number of explorable planet over 30 + each precisely describe and settle

The main power is the inter stellar union dont mess with them in ur early days or you may end up in the worst prison ever TarTar

Second universe : Telos

45+ explorable planet with warlord avaible

This universe is narrowly in a never ending war its impossible to travel without getting attacked so make sure to have your fleet strong enough to survive 1 hour there its litterally hardcore mode there you wont catch ur breath until reaching a warlord planet where you'll be slighty less jumped . The empire there is known for they're viltrumite level of strengh warrior ( there's no viltrumite in this bot its just for comparaison)

Kethari spot one and ur either brutally destroying him or her

or getting annilihate

I recently update the bot i manage to compact 120K+ worth of text into seperated lore book i hope its work theres two new galaxy Moira and Archi

Now within the bot there around and over one hundred planet

I hope you'll like this bot dont worry dear llm user i there's 900 boy and female unique name you shouldnt see Zara Voss or Zephyr and Zephyra anytime soon...i lowkey despise those name cuz of janitor now

for the power system its called Omen quite powerfull divide into three category Emittion mutation transformation each wit
